GNOME.name: GNOME
GNOME.description: Modern, touch-friendly DE with Activities overview, Wayland-first, minimal distractions. Used by Ubuntu, Fedora.

KDE Plasma.name: KDE Plasma
KDE Plasma.description: Highly customizable full DE with panels, widgets, and deep settings. Used by Kubuntu, openSUSE, KDE neon.

Cinnamon.name: Cinnamon
Cinnamon.description: Traditional desktop with taskbar and start menu. Feels familiar to Windows users. Used by Linux Mint.

Budgie.name: Budgie
Budgie.description: Clean, modern DE with a sidebar notification center. Used by Solus, Ubuntu Budgie.

Pantheon.name: Pantheon
Pantheon.description: macOS-inspired, curated DE with dock and minimal settings. Used exclusively by elementary OS.

MATE.name: MATE
MATE.description: Continuation of GNOME 2. Traditional, stable, moderate on resources. Used by Ubuntu MATE.

Xfce.name: Xfce
Xfce.description: Lightweight, traditional DE. Stable and low resource usage. Used by Xubuntu, MX Linux.

LXQt.name: LXQt
LXQt.description: Ultra-lightweight Qt-based DE. Successor to LXDE. Used by Lubuntu.

Deepin DE.name: Deepin DE
Deepin DE.description: Visually stunning DE with macOS/iOS design language. Used by Deepin.

i3.name: i3
i3.description: Manual tiling WM controlled entirely via keyboard. Highly efficient for developers.

Sway.name: Sway
Sway.description: Wayland-native i3-compatible tiling WM. Drop-in replacement for i3 on Wayland.

Hyprland.name: Hyprland
Hyprland.description: Dynamic Wayland compositor with smooth animations and eye-candy. Popular with ricers.

Openbox.name: Openbox
Openbox.description: Minimal stacking WM. Right-click menu driven. Used by BunsenLabs, ArchCraft.

IceWM.name: IceWM
IceWM.description: Lightweight WM with taskbar. Mimics Windows 95 layout. Used by antiX.
